---
title: "What I Read in 2025"
date: 2025-12-31
description: "A year of balancing academic reading with non-fiction and a few memorable novels."
categories: [books]
---

In 2025 I tried to combine research-related material with more general non-fiction and some fiction (mostly to disconnect a bit). *Adaptive Survey Design* was particularly relevant for my doctoral work, while my non-fiction reading ended up focusing quite a bit on social inequality and the societal effects of new technologies. I especially enjoyed books by Patrick Radden Keefe (again, after *Say Nothing*) and Jonathan Haidt (who has changed my point of view on social media). I also came across books by Ingrid Robeyns and George Monbiot & Peter Hutchison in a very nice bookstore in Bristol.

I also read several novels. *Cien años de soledad* by Gabriel García Márquez and Philip Roth’s *The Plot Against America* were probably the highlights.

---

## 📚 Books

- *Una família americana* — J. D. Vance  
- ⭐ *Cien años de soledad* — Gabriel García Márquez  
- *Cómo escribir y publicar una tesis doctoral* — Jaime Rivera Camino  
- *Esclavos del algoritmo* — Laura G. De Rivera  
- *La idea d'Europa* — George Steiner  
- *Una breu història de la igualtat* — Thomas Piketty  
- *Paradojas* — Gareth Southwell  
- *Autocracia S.A.* — Anne Applebaum  
- ⭐ *The invisible doctrine. The secret history of neoliberalism* — George Monbiot & Peter Hutchison  
- *Yo vengo del sur. El legado de una vida política* — Pepe Mujica  
- ⭐ *Limitarianism. The case against extreme wealth* — Ingrid Robeyns  
- *Trabajar: un amor no correspondido* — Sarah Jaffe  
- *El càstig* — Guillem Sala  
- ⭐ *Adaptive Survey Design* — Barry Schouten, Andy Peytchev & James Wagner  
- *Cómo mienten los mapas* — Mark Monmonier  
- ⭐ *L'imperi del dolor. La història secreta de la dinastia Sackler* — Patrick Radden Keefe  
- *Digitalización Democrática* — Simona Levi  
- *Hijos de la medianoche* — Salman Rushdie  
- *Filosofia per a exploradors polars* — Erling Kagge  
- *La utilidad de lo inútil* — Nuccio Ordine  
- ⭐ *La conjura contra América* — Philip Roth  
- *Deep Work* — Cal Newport  
- *Moral Ambition* — Rutger Bregman  
- ⭐ *La generación ansiosa* — Jonathan Haidt  
- *Slow Productivity* — Cal Newport  
- *Calling Bullshit* — Carl T. Bergstrom & Jevin D. West  
- *¡Reconquista tu tiempo!* — Jenny Odell  

---
